Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

1. Overview

Rytme is a running app designed to help you train with dynamic run-walk intervals and a ghost pacer. We take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.

2. Data We Collect

  • Run Data: Distance, pace, duration, route (if GPS is enabled), and heart rate (via HealthKit, if you grant permission).
  • Health Data: Optional integration with Apple Health for heart rate and workouts.
  • Location Data: Used only during active runs when you enable GPS tracking or Spectator/Coach Mode.
  • Device Information: Basic app diagnostics and crash reports.

3. How We Use Your Data

We use your data only to provide and improve the Rytme experience. We do not sell your data or share it with third parties for advertising.

4. Spectator / Coach Mode

When you use Spectator or Coach Mode, limited location and run data is shared only with people you explicitly approve. You control who can see your location and can revoke access at any time.

5. Data Storage

Most of your run history is stored locally on your device using SwiftData. Some data (such as Spectator connections) is stored securely in the cloud when you use those features.

6. Your Rights

You can delete all your run history at any time from within the app. You can also revoke HealthKit and location permissions through iOS Settings.

7. Contact

If you have questions about this policy, please contact us at privacy@rytme.app.

© Rytme. All rights reserved.
